name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, state, messages, decision
ParticipantStates == {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* State definitions for coordinator *)
CoordinatorStates == {"Init", "Deciding", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* Message definitions *)
Message == [type: {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"},
           from: ANY,
           to: ANY,
           payload: ANY]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ participants \subseteq 1..N
    /\ coordinator \in 1..N
    /\ coordinator \notin participants
    /\ state = [id \in participants \cup {coordinator} |-> 
                IF id = coordinator THEN "Init" ELSE "Init"]
    /\ messages = <<>>
    /\ decision = "None"

(* Helper predicates *)
IsParticipant(id) == id \in participants
IsCoordinator(id) == id = coordinator

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
SendPrepare ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = "Init"
    /\ messages' = messages \o << [type |-> "Prepare",
                                   from |-> coordinator,
                                   to |-> p,
                                   payload |-> <<>>] : p \in participants >>
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Deciding"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, decision>>

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes Yes *)
ReceivePrepareAndVoteYes ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = "Deciding"
    /\ messages' = [m \in messages |-> m.type = "Prepare" /\ m.to \in participants /\ m.from = coordinator]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![m.to] = "Prepared"]
    /\ messages' = messages' \o << [type |-> "VoteYes",
                                     from |-> m.to,
                                     to |-> coordinator,
                                     payload |-> <<>>] : m \in messages' >>
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, decision>>

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes No *)
ReceivePrepareAndVoteNo ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = "Deciding"
    /\ messages' = [m \in messages |-> m.type = "Prepare" /\ m.to \inparticipants /\ m.from = coordinator]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![m.to] = "Aborted"]
    /\ messages' = messages' \o << [type |-> "VoteNo",
                                     from |-> m.to,
                                     to |-> coordinator,
                                     payload |-> <<>>] : m \in messages' >>
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, decision>>

(* Coordinator receives all VoteYes and decides Commit *)
CoordinatorDecidesCommit ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = "Deciding"
    /\ \A p \in participants : state[p] = "Prepared"
    /\ messages' = messages \o << [type |-> "Commit",
                                   from |-> coordinator,
                                   to |-> p,
                                   payload |-> <<>>] : p \in participants >>
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Committed"]
    /\ decision' = "Commit"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants>>

(* Coordinator receives any VoteNo and decides Abort *)
CoordinatorDecidesAbort ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = "Deciding"
    /\ \E p \in participants : state[p] = "Aborted"
    /\ messages' = messages \o << [type |-> "Abort",
                                   from |-> coordinator,
                                   to |-> p,
                                   payload |-> <<>>] : p \in participants >>
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Aborted"]
    /\ decision' = "Abort"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants>>

(* Participants receive Commit and transition to Committed *)
ReceiveCommit ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = "Committed"
    /\ messages' = [m \in messages |-> m.type = "Commit" /\ m.to \in participants /\ m.from = coordinator]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![m.to] = "Committed"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, decision>>

(* Participants receive Abort and transition to Aborted *)
ReceiveAbort ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = "Aborted"
    /\ messages' = [m \in messages |-> m.type = "Abort" /\ m.to \in participants /\ m.from = coordinator]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![m.to] = "Aborted"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, decision>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ SendPrepare
    \/ ReceivePrepareAndVoteYes
    \/ ReceivePrepareAndVoteNo
    \/ CoordinatorDecidesCommit
    \/ CoordinatorDecidesAbort
    \/ ReceiveCommit
    \/ ReceiveAbort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, state, messages, decision>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ participants \subseteq 1..N
    /\ coordinator \in 1..N
    /\ coordinator \notin participants
    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
    /\ messages \in Seq(Message)
    /\ decision \in {"None", "Commit", "Abort"}

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC, Integers

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Constants *)
N \in Nat
N > 0

(* State of each philosopher: "thinking", "hungry", "eating" *)
StateValues == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is owned by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means free *)
ForkOwner == [i \in 1..N |-> forks[i] \in 1..N \/ forks[i] = -1]

(* Initial state: all forks free, all philosophers thinking *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper predicates *)
LeftFork(i) == (i - 1) % N + 1
RightFork(i) == i % N + 1

FreeFork(i) == forks[i] = -1

AdjacentFree(i) == FreeFork(LeftFork(i)) /\ FreeFork(RightFork(i))

(* Transition: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
Hungry(i) == /\ state[i] = "thinking"
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
           /\ forks' = forks

(* Transition: philosopher i picks up forks and starts eating *)
Eat(i) == /\ state[i] = "hungry"
        /\ AdjacentFree(i)
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = i, ![RightFork(i)] = i]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Transition: philosopher i puts down forks and stops eating *)
Think(i) == /\ state[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = -1, ![RightFork(i)] = -1]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          (Hungry(i) \/ Eat(i) \/ Think(i))

(* Invariant: fork ownership is consistent *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N |-> 1..N \/ -1]
          /\ state \in [1..N |-> StateValues]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>> /\ TypeOK

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i
   flag[i] is TRUE if process i is choosing a number
*)

(* The set of process identifiers *)
ProcessIds == 1..N

(* Initialization: all tickets are 0 and no process is choosing *)
Init == /\ num \in [ProcessIds -> 0]
        /\ flag \in [ProcessIds -> FALSE]

(* Choosing phase: process i sets flag[i] to TRUE *)
Choosing(i) == /\ flag[i] = FALSE
               /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
               /\ UNCHANGED num

(* Numbering phase: process i assigns a ticket number *)
Numbering(i) == /\ flag[i] = TRUE
               /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
               /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
               /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Entering critical section: process i waits until all other processes
   with smaller ticket numbers have finished *)
Entering(i) == /\ flag[i] = FALSE
               /\ num[i] > 0
               /\ \A j \in ProcessIds \ {i} :
                    /\ flag[j] = FALSE
                    \/ num[j] = 0
                    \/ num[j] > num[i]
               /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

(* Exiting critical section: process i resets its ticket number *)
Exiting(i) == /\ flag[i] = FALSE
              /\ num[i] > 0
              /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
              /\ UNCHANGED flag

(* Next state: any process can be in any phase *)
Next == \E i \in ProcessIds :
          (Choosing(i) \/ Numbering(i) \/ Entering(i) \/ Exiting(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

(* Type invariant: num is a function from ProcessIds to Nat,
   flag is a function from ProcessIds to BOOLEAN *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [ProcessIds -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [ProcessIds -> BOOLEAN]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, each element is a natural number or the special value "empty" *)
(* head and tail are indices into q, ranging from 0 to K-1 *)
(* size is the number of elements currently in the queue *)

TypeOK == 
    /\ K \in Nat
    /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
    /\ head \in 0..K-1
    /\ tail \in 0..K-1
    /\ size \in 0..K
    /\ \A i \in 0..K-1: q[i] \in Nat \/ q[i] = "empty"

Init == 
    /\ q = [i \in 0..K-1 |-> "empty"]
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q[tail] = "empty"
    /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1] \* Example: produce value 1
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q[head] \in Nat
    /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = "empty"]
    /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ tail' = tail

Next == 
    ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == 
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>> /\ TypeOK

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
CONSTANTS Servers

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



(* --constants
Servers \in SUBSET Nat
*)

(* --type invariants *)
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
        /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Servers
        /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}

(* --initialization *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = Follower

(* --state transitions *)
FollowerToCandidate ==
    /\ state = Follower
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
    /\ votedFor' = None
    /\ state' = Candidate
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

CandidateToLeader ==
    /\ state = Candidate
    /\ state' = Leader
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

CandidateToFollower ==
    /\ state = Candidate
    /\ state' = Follower
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* --next-state relation *)
Next == FollowerToCandidate
      \/ CandidateToLeader
      \/ CandidateToFollower

(* --specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

(* Reader process *)
Reader == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers' = readers + 1
  /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  /\ readers' \in Nat

Writer == 
  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers' = readers

Init == 
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  \/ (* Reader acquires lock *)
      /\ writer_active = FALSE
      /\ readers' = readers + 1
      /\ writer_active' = writer_active
      /\ readers' \in Nat
  \/ (* Reader releases lock *)
      /\ writer_active = FALSE
      /\ readers' = readers - 1
      /\ writer_active' = writer_active
      /\ readers' \in Nat
  \/ (* Writer acquires lock *)
      /\ writer_active' = TRUE
      /\ writer_active = FALSE
      /\ readers' = readers
  \/ (* Writer releases lock *)
      /\ writer_active' = FALSE
      /\ writer_active = TRUE
      /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
CONSTANTS Channels

VARIABLES procState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived, recorded, N
N > 0

Channels \in SUBSET [1..N, 1..N] \ { i..i \mid i \in 1..N }  \* All directed channels except self-loops

Init ==
    /\ procState \in [1..N -> [state: Nat]]
    /\ channelState \in [Channels -> Seq(Nat)]
    /\ markerSent \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ markerReceived \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ recorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : procState[i] = [state |-> 0]
    /\ \A c \in Channels : channelState[c] = <<>>
    /\ \A c \in Channels : markerSent[c] = FALSE
    /\ \A c \in Channels : markerReceived[c] = FALSE
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : recorded[i] = FALSE

SendMarker(i, j) ==
    /\ markerSent[i..j] = FALSE
    /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![i..j] = TRUE]
    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i..j] = Append(channelState[i..j], "marker")]

ReceiveMarker(i, j) ==
    /\ markerReceived[i..j] = FALSE
    /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![i..j] = TRUE]
    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i..j] = RemoveLast(channelState[i..j])]
    /\ IF recorded[i] = FALSE THEN
           /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
           /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![i] = [state |-> procState[i][state] + 1]]
           /\ \A k \in 1..N : k # i
                 /\ IF markerSent[k..i] = FALSE THEN
                        /\ SendMarker(k, i)
                 /\ IF markerReceived[k..i] = FALSE THEN
                        /\ ReceiveMarker(k, i)

           /\ procState' = procState
           /\ channelState' = channelState
           /\ markerSent' = markerSent
           /\ markerReceived' = markerReceived
           /\ recorded' = recorded

SendMessage(i, j, msg) ==
    /\ markerSent[i..j] = FALSE
    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i..j] = Append(channelState[i..j], msg)]
    /\ procState' = procState
    /\ markerReceived' = markerReceived
    /\ recorded' = recorded

ReceiveMessage(i, j, msg) ==
    /\ markerReceived[i..j] = FALSE
    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i..j] = RemoveLast(channelState[i..j])]
    /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![i] = [state |-> procState[i][state] + msg]]
    /\ markerSent' = markerSent
    /\ recorded' = recorded

Next ==
    \E i, j \in 1..N : i # j :
        \/ SendMarker(i, j)
        \/ ReceiveMarker(i, j)
        \/ SendMessage(i, j, 1)
        \/ ReceiveMessage(i, j, 1)

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<procState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived, recorded>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ procState \in [1..N -> [state: Nat]]
    /\ channelState \in [Channels -> Seq(Nat)]
    /\ markerSent \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ markerReceived \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ recorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES tokenPos, messages

(* Constants *)
CONSTANT N

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == /\ tokenPos \in 1..N
          /\ messages \in Seq(1..N)

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ tokenPos = 1
        /\ messages = <<>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  /\ tokenPos' \in 1..N
  /\ messages' \in Seq(1..N)
  /\ LET nextPos == IF tokenPos = N THEN 1 ELSE tokenPos + 1 IN
     /\ tokenPos' = nextPos
     /\ IF tokenPos = nextPos THEN
          (* Token holder may send a message *)
          /\ messages' = Append(messages, tokenPos)

          /\ messages' = messages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<tokenPos, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

(* The store is a partial function from Keys to Values *)
TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

Init == store \in [Keys -> Values] /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

(* Put operation: updates the value for a key *)
Put(k, v) == /\ k \in Keys
              /\ v \in Values
              /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Get operation: reads the value for a key *)
Get(k) == /\ k \in Keys
           /\ store' = store

Next == \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v)
      \/ \E k \in Keys: Get(k)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SingleDecreePaxos ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, M, Vals, NULL

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosenValue, chosenBallot, Proposer, Proposers, a, ballot, value
AcceptorsState == [id: Id, ballot: Nat, value: Val?]

\* Proposers' state: [id: Id, ballot: Nat, value: Val?]
ProposersState == [id: Id, ballot: Nat, value: Val?]

\* Helper: All acceptors have responded with promises
AllPromises(p) == \E a \in acceptors :
    a.ballot = p.ballot
    /\ a.value \in Vals
    /\ a.value = p.value

\* Helper: All acceptors have accepted the value
AllAccepted(p) == \E a \in acceptors :
    a.ballot = p.ballot
    /\ a.value = p.value

\* Initial state
Init == 
    /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [id |-> i, ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
    /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [id |-> j, ballot |-> 0, value |-> NULL]]
    /\ chosenValue = NULL
    /\ chosenBallot = 0

\* Proposer's Prepare phase
Prepare(p) == 
    /\ p.ballot' = p.ballot + 1
    /\ p.value' = p.value
    /\ acceptors' = [a \in acceptors |-> 

            [a EXCEPT !.ballot = p.ballot', !.value = p.value']

            a]
    /\ chosenValue' = chosenValue
    /\ chosenBallot' = chosenBallot

\* Accept phase
Accept(p) == 
    /\ p.ballot' = p.ballot
    /\ p.value' = p.value
    /\ acceptors' = [a \in acceptors |-> 

            [a EXCEPT !.ballot = p.ballot', !.value = p.value']

            a]
    /\ chosenValue' = chosenValue
    /\ chosenBallot' = chosenBallot

\* Once chosen, value never changes
Chosen(p) == 
    /\ chosenValue' = p.value
    /\ chosenBallot' = p.ballot
    /\ acceptors' = [a \in acceptors |-> 

            [a EXCEPT !.ballot = p.ballot', !.value = p.value']

            a]
    /\ proposers' = [q \in proposers |-> 

            [q EXCEPT !.ballot = p.ballot', !.value = p.value']

            q]
    /\ acceptors' = [a \in acceptors |-> 

            [a EXCEPT !.ballot = p.ballot', !.value = p.value']

            a]

\* Next state
Next == 
    \E p \in proposers :
        /\ p.id \in proposers
        /\ p.ballot' = p.ballot
        /\ p.value' = p.value
        /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ proposers' = proposers
        /\ chosenValue' = chosenValue
        /\ chosenBallot' = chosenBallot
        /\ \E a \in acceptors :
            /\ a.id = p.id
            /\ a.ballot' = p.ballot + 1
            /\ a.value' = p.value
            /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a.id] = a']
            /\ proposers' = proposers
            /\ chosenValue' = chosenValue
            /\ chosenBallot' = chosenBallot
        \/ \E a \in acceptors :
            /\ a.id = p.id
            /\ a.ballot' = p.ballot
            /\ a.value' = p.value
            /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a.id] = a']
            /\ proposers' = proposers
            /\ chosenValue' = chosenValue
            /\ chosenBallot' = chosenBallot
        \/ \E a \in acceptors :
            /\ a.id = p.id
            /\ a.ballot' = p.ballot
            /\ a.value' = p.value
            /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a.id] = a']
            /\ proposers' = proposers
            /\ chosenValue' = p.value
            /\ chosenBallot' = p.ballot

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosenValue, chosenBallot>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> AcceptorsState]
    /\ proposers \in [1..M -> ProposersState]
    /\ chosenValue \in Vals \/ chosenValue = NULL
    /\ chosenBallot \in Nat

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES channelState, fileChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks


(* The file is divided into chunks of size CHUNK_SIZE *)
Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = SubSeq(1..FILE_SIZE, CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channelState = "idle"

(* The channel can be in one of three states:
   "idle"   - no message in transit
   "sent"   - a message has been sent but not yet acknowledged
   "lost"   - a message was sent but lost
*)
ChannelState ==
    {"idle", "sent", "lost"}

(* The sender can send a chunk if the channel is idle *)
SendChunk ==
    /\ channelState = "idle"
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, Head(fileChunks))
    /\ fileChunks' = Tail(fileChunks)
    /\ channelState' = "sent"
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<retransmitCount, channelState>>

(* The sender can retransmit the last sent chunk if the channel is idle *)
Retransmit ==
    /\ channelState = "idle"
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, Head(fileChunks))
    /\ fileChunks' = Tail(fileChunks)
    /\ channelState' = "sent"
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<retransmitCount, channelState>>

(* The channel can lose the sent message *)
LoseMessage ==
    /\ channelState = "sent"
    /\ channelState' = "lost"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

(* The channel can deliver the sent message *)
DeliverMessage ==
    /\ channelState = "sent"
    /\ channelState' = "idle"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

(* The sender can give up after MAX_RETRIES *)
GiveUp ==
    /\ channelState = "sent"
    /\ retransmitCount = MAX_RETRIES
    /\ channelState' = "idle"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ LoseMessage
    \/ DeliverMessage
    \/ GiveUp

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channelState>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ fileChunks \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ channelState \in ChannelState

====
